archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) with Brutalist Editorial Twist
design_philosophy: A confident, editorial, and systems-focused portfolio. Rejects generic 'soft' UX minimalism in favor of raw structure, high-contrast typography, and visible grids to emphasize Ihnat's role as a Digital Systems Developer fixing bottlenecks. Uses a 1px hard grid, zero border radius, and an industrial accent color.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

layout.spacing_system: Generous and asymmetric. Use p-6, p-8, p-12, p-24.
layout.grid_strategy: The 'Technical' Look. Use visible 1px hard borders (border-collapse style) to separate sections. No soft shadows. Use hard offset shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F0F0F]) for interactive elements.
layout.container: Max-width 8xl, centered, with visible vertical border lines on the edges if possible.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is MANDATORY.
motion.interactions: Hover states on case studies should feature a slight image zoom and a hard border color change. Buttons should translate slightly with the hard shadow adjusting to simulate pressing.
motion.page_load: Staggered reveal of the grid lines and typography.

components.navigation: Sticky top bar with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md) OR a solid #F4F4F0 bg with a hard 1px bottom border. Must include Logo, Work, Contact, and LinkedIn links.
components.hero: Massive typography introducing Ihnat. Use a Marquee with IBM Plex Mono reading 'SYSTEMS • WORKFLOWS • AUTOMATION' across the screen.
components.case_study_card: A raw, border-enclosed rectangular container. Image takes up top 60%, content at the bottom. Tags (chips) use mono font with 1px solid borders.
components.contact_form: Shadcn UI forms heavily customized: 0px border radius, 1px solid black border, focus state must use the accent color (ring-2 ring-[#FF3E1A] ring-offset-0). Submit button must have the hard drop shadow.

hero_background.description: Black and white abstract architectural geometry. Can be used as a subtle overlay or accent image in the hero section.

case_study_1.title: Premium Service Website & Booking Experience
case_study_1.description: Hotel receptionist handing a key card, symbolizing premium service desk.

case_study_2.title: Lead Capture & Follow-up Workflow
case_study_2.description: Abstract black and blue geometric structure symbolizing digital workflow and routing.

case_study_3.title: Offer From Brief Workflow
case_study_3.description: Architectural floor plans and a pen on a desk, symbolizing blueprinting and B2B document offers.

case_study_4.title: Selected Partner Implementation
case_study_4.description: Geodesic dome structure showing geometric integration and solid partnership architecture.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against #F4F4F0 meets strict WCAG AA contrast. The accent #FF3E1A must be paired with white or #F4F4F0 text if used as a background.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='case-study-link-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards with rounded corners and soft shadows. Override Shadcn styles to feature 0px border-radius and 1px solid #0F0F0F borders.
Implement the 'Technical' grid layout: visible grid lines separating major sections and case studies.
Ensure typography hierarchy is strictly followed, using Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Mono for technical details/tags.
Build the contact form using Shadcn components (Input, Textarea, Button, Form) but strip away Vercel-like aesthetics to match the brutalist editorial theme.
